creator: mohawk@bsdsx.fr
text:
On Wed, Aug 29, 2012 at 05:50:24AM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of www/mohawk,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/171152 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/171152
>

Approved
